question: When do the remote work policy changes take effect?
response:
The remote work policy changes take effect **January 1, 2026**.

Key details from the email (sent by Rachel Nguyen on Oct 15, 2025):
- **Structured hybrid model**: minimum 3 days in-office per week (Tuesdayâ€“Thursday)
- Monday and Friday remain flexible remote days
- Applies to all locations including the Berlin office when it opens
- Fully remote role exceptions continue case-by-case through department heads
